arts.ttl: Man City Star Urges Club to Secure PSG, Tottenham Transfer Target
arts.sum: Nico Williams was one of the hottest names in transfer rumors this past summer, attracting interest from top clubs like Chelsea, Liverpool, Manchester City, Manchester United, Tottenham, Barcelona, and Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: PSG Poised to Rival Liverpool, Man Utd in Monitoring Juventus Teenage Sensation
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be challenging other top European clubs to secure a young talent from Juventus, who has yet to scratch the ceiling of his potential. Manchester United are under a new manager, Ruben Amorim, and the Red Devils will have to begin molding the squad in the Portuguese manager’s vision. arts.ttl: Milan, Roma Set to Face Challenge From PSG for Serie A Standout Defender
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain need a right-back behind Achraf Hakimi to spell him in moments and challenge him for the starting job. As the January transfer window opens in a few weeks, the capital club could look for depth behind the Moroccan.
